mapper.sql: rdj.demand_id, rdj.job_name,rdj.job_id, rdj.quantity, rdj.base_condition, rdj.special_flag, rdj.special_midecal, rdj.need_flag, rdj.enabled_flag, rdj.id, rdj.create_time, rdj.create_by, rdj.update_time, rdj.update_by, 1 as real_flag, 0 as show_box, (select job_name from fnd_job where id = rdj.job_id) as job_name_by_id, rdj.risk_factors, rdj.team_mes, rdj.job_first_count, rdj.job_second_count, rdj.job_third_count, rdj.job_current_count, rdj.pass_quantity, rdj.in_used_quantity, rdj.add_before_approval_flag

${tAlias}.demand_id as ${tAlias}_demand_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, (select job_name from fnd_job where id = ${tAlias}.job_id) as ${tAlias}_job_name_by_id, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.quantity as ${tAlias}_quantity, ${tAlias}.base_condition as ${tAlias}_base_condition, ${tAlias}.special_flag as ${tAlias}_special_flag, ${tAlias}.special_midecal as ${tAlias}_special_midecal, ${tAlias}.need_flag as ${tAlias}_need_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, 1 as ${tAlias}_real_flag, 0 as ${tAlias}_show_box, ${tAlias}.risk_factors as ${tAlias}_risk_factors, ${tAlias}.team_mes as ${tAlias}_team_mes, ${tAlias}.job_first_count as ${tAlias}_job_first_count, ${tAlias}.job_second_count as ${tAlias}_job_second_count, ${tAlias}.job_third_count as ${tAlias}_job_third_count, ${tAlias}.job_current_count as ${tAlias}_job_current_count, ${tAlias}.agree_num as ${tAlias}_agree_num, ${tAlias}.in_used_quantity as ${tAlias}_in_used_quantity, ${tAlias}.pass_quantity as ${tAlias}_pass_quantity, ${tAlias}.add_before_approval_flag as ${tAlias}_add_before_approval_flag
mapper.insert: insert into re_demand_job (demand_id, job_name, job_id, quantity, base_condition, special_flag, special_midecal, need_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, risk_factors, team_mes, job_first_count, job_second_count, job_third_count, job_current_count, in_used_quantity, pass_quantity, add_before_approval_flag,agree_num) values (#{demandId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobId, jdbcType= BIGINT}, #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{baseCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specialMidecal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{riskFactors, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{teamMes, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{jobFirstCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{jobSecondCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{jobThirdCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{jobCurrentCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{inUsedQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{passQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{addBeforeApprovalFlag, jdbcType = BIT},#{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_demand_job set demand_id = #{demandId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_id = #{jobId, jdbcType= BIGINT}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, base_condition = #{baseCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, special_flag = #{specialFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, special_midecal = #{specialMidecal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, need_flag = #{needFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, risk_factors = #{riskFactors, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, team_mes = #{teamMes, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, job_first_count = #{jobFirstCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, job_second_count = #{jobSecondCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, job_third_count = #{jobThirdCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, job_current_count = #{jobCurrentCount, jdbcType = INTEGER}, agree_num = #{agreeNum, jdbcType = INTEGER}, in_used_quantity = #{inUsedQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, pass_quantity = #{passQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, add_before_approval_flag = #{addBeforeApprovalFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update re_demand_job set enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select rd.demand_code as demand_code, rd.id as id, rd.dept_id as dept_id, rd.dept_name as dept_name, rd.office_name as office_name, rd.team as team, rd.dept_first_count as dept_first_count, rd.dept_second_count as dept_second_count, rd.dept_third_count as dept_second_count, rd.dept_current_count, rdj.id as rdj_demand_job_id, rdj.job_id as rdj_job_id, rdj.job_name as rdj_job_name, rdj.quantity as rdj_quantity, isnull(rdj.in_used_quantity, 0) as rdj_in_used_quantity, isnull(rdj.pass_quantity, 0) as rdj_pass_quantity, rdj.job_first_count as rdj_job_first_count, rdj.job_second_count as rdj_job_second_count, rdj.job_third_count as rdj_job_third_count, rdj.job_current_count as rdj_job_current_count,rdj.agree_num as rdj_agree_num from re_demand rd join re_demand_job rdj on rd.id = rdj.demand_id and rd.enabled_flag = 1 and rdj.enabled_flag = 1 and rd.real_demand_status = 'complete'
and rd.demand_code like #{criteria.demandCode, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
and exists (select 1 from re_demand_job rdjj where rdjj.id = rdj.id and rdjj.agree_num > isnull(rdj.in_used_quantity, 0))
and exists (select 1 from re_demand_job rdjj where rdjj.id = rdj.id and rdjj.quantity = isnull(rdj.in_used_quantity, 0))
mapper.update: update rdj set in_used_quantity = isnull(in_used_quantity, 0) + 1 from re_demand_job rdj where rdj.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rdj.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(rdj.in_used_quantity, 0) < rdj.agree_num
update rdj set pass_quantity = isnull(pass_quantity, 0) + 1 from re_demand_job rdj where rdj.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rdj.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(rdj.pass_quantity, 0) < rdj.agree_num
update rdj set in_used_quantity = isnull(in_used_quantity, 0) -1 from re_demand_job rdj where rdj.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rdj.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(rdj.in_used_quantity, 0) > 0

update re_demand_job set in_used_quantity = #{newInUsedQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, pass_quantity = #{passQuantity, jdbcType = INTEGER}, demand_open_by = #{demandOpenBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, demand_open_time = getdate() where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(1) from re_demand_job where need_check_flag = 1 and enabled_flag = 1 and demand_id = #{demandId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
select agree_num - isnull(in_used_quantity, 0) from re_demand_job where enabled_flag = 1 and id = #{demandJobId, jdbcType = BIGINT}

select rd.demand_code, isnull(rdj.agree_num,0)-isnull(rdj.pass_quantity,0) as remaining_personnel, rdj.job_name from re_demand rd left join re_demand_job rdj on rd.id=rdj.demand_id where rd.dept_id=#{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and rd.real_demand_status='complete' and (isnull(rdj.agree_num,0)-isnull(rdj.pass_quantity,0)>0) and rdj.enabled_flag=1 and rd.enabled_flag=1 and rd.demand_code !=#{demandCode, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and rd.demand_code not like 'L%' order by rd.id desc
